children.text: The early 20th century is where the origins of anime began, but it wasn’t till Osamu Tezuka, the “Godfather of manga”, who produced the iconic anime of Astro Boy, laid the foundation for the identity of Anime to take form. It wasn’t until the 1990’s Anime finally broke into the mainstream consciousness in the US. Anime is now a global phenomenon with fans hailing from Latin America to the East of the globe. This archive focuses on the use of astrological symbolism in anime, specifically Chinese and Western zodiac systems are incorporated into storytelling. The incorporation of Chinese and Western astrological symbolism in anime not only shapes the narrative themes and character systems, but is significant to the rising popularity among western female audience members, reflecting broader shifts in the U.S pop culture and anime fandom.
